artifact: Elimination in Q1 is represented as the five slowest q1 times for raceId 20.
sql: SELECT d."driverRef" FROM qualifying q JOIN drivers d ON q."driverId" = d."driverId" WHERE q."raceId" = 20 AND q.q1 IS NOT NULL AND q.q1 <> '\N' ORDER BY q.q1 DESC LIMIT 5;
